name: @types/lodash
usage_summary: lodash is heavily used across cli-kit: direct type imports from 'lodash' (Dictionary, ObjectIterator, PropertyPath, ValueKeyIteratee, List, ValueIteratee, DebouncedFunc, DebounceSettings, ThrottleSettings) appear in object.ts, collection.ts, array.ts, and function.ts; subpath imports (lodash/sortBy.js, lodash/isEqual.js, etc.) appear in ~20 files. lodash@4.17.23 does not ship its own .d.ts files.
how_to_remove: Not a removal candidate. To eliminate the dependency, replace all lodash usage with native JS equivalents or a typed-by-default alternative (e.g. es-toolkit). This would require touching ~20 source files across cli-kit.
replacement_reason: lodash is pervasively used and does not bundle types. Replacement would require a large refactor across cli-kit.
